rationale: Temperature is above the learned monthly baseline. CO2 exceeds the learned monthly baseline. Energy consumption is unusually high compared with the monthly baseline. These indicate a critical indoor-environment anomaly.
recommended_action: Send Cruzr to response point and request operator acknowledgement.

rationale: Temperature is above the learned monthly baseline. CO2 exceeds the learned monthly baseline. Energy consumption is unusually high compared with the monthly baseline. These indicate an early warning indoor-environment anomaly.
recommended_action: Create warning AlertEvent and notify operator.
